notes: Each element deals bonus damage to the elements in strong_vs and takes bonus damage from those in weak_to.
Attacking with a super-effective element also means the attacker resists that target's attacks.
Main loop: Fire > Grass > Ground > Electric > Water > Fire. Side chain: Fire > Ice > Dragon > Dark > Neutral.
Fire double-dips: it counters both Grass and Ice. Neutral has no offensive advantage and its only weakness is Dark.
A truly typeless boss (World Tree final boss Astralym) has no exploitable weakness.

sources.what: initial chart compiled from game8.co, nexttier.pro, thepalprofessor.com, palworld.fandom.com
verification: full 9-element strong_vs/weak_to table matches this chart exactly
second verification (article dated 2026-06-08): all rows match; confirms 1.5x super-effective multiplier and Fire's double strength vs Grass and Ice
